vocab.example: In high school, I was part of a formidable lineup that remained undefeated for the entire season.

vocab.meaning: chia sẻ một mục tiêu chung
vocab.example: Being in a team teaches you how to collaborate with diverse personalities who all share a common goal.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/kỹ năng thể thao xuất sắc
vocab.example: Although I wasn't known for my sporting prowess, my teammates valued my reliability and spirit.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: The rigorous training sessions helped instill discipline that has stayed with me well into my adult life.

vocab.meaning: một chiến thắng của tập thể
vocab.example: Winning the regional trophy felt like a collective triumph after months of grueling early-morning practices.
The culture of our squad was built on mutual encouragement, especially during periods when we faced losing streaks.

vocab.meaning: sự hào hứng/phấn khích khi thi đấu
vocab.example: I joined the volleyball club primarily to experience the thrill of competition and the adrenaline of match days.

vocab.meaning: tạo nên một mối liên kết bền chặt
vocab.example: Spending countless hours on the bus to away games allowed us to forge a strong bond outside of the sport itself.

vocab.meaning: đảm nhận/chấp nhận vai trò lãnh đạo
vocab.example: During my senior year, I was asked to embrace a leadership role as the vice-captain of the swim team.

vocab.meaning: chống lại lối sống ít vận động
vocab.example: Joining a local amateur league was my way to counteract a sedentary lifestyle caused by my demanding office job.
